MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Caitlyn Hobbs, Esq. of Smith Hall Strongin, LLP, T:949.529.2250, for defendant/moving party;
Warren R. Webster, Esq. of Hassard Bonnington LLP, T:415.288.9800, for plaintiff/opposing party.

RULING: The tentative ruling was contested and argued. After arguments, tne Court takes DEFENDANT MAPLEBEAR, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

***After hearing, the Court signed an order denying the motion. See order for details.***
